message:
fix(vdbe): type affinity coercion in comparisons (#92) + 7 new conformance tests

TEXT vs INTEGER/REAL comparisons now apply affinity coercion per SQLite §4.2.
VDBE codegen emits comparison affinity in P5 via expr_affinity() and
comparison_affinity_p5(). Connection cmp_values() also coerces TEXT to
numeric when the entire string is a valid number.

Added 7 conformance oracle tests: update_where_in_subquery, index_with_where,
complex_cte_with_join, rowid_operations, math_functions_extended,
datetime_functions_extended, type_affinity_coercion. Total: 261 oracle tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
